parsed.availability_comment: Recent primary reporting indicates recovery; no March 2026 RCB unavailability report found, but no explicit franchise fitness bulletin either.
parsed.availability_note: Returned from the December 2025 hamstring strain and was reported training without visible limitation during Australia's T20 World Cup camp on February 6, 2026.
parsed.followup_reason: Recovery evidence is recent and credible, and no current suspension or tournament-conflict issue was found.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Useful finisher, but not an automatic lock if RCB prefer extra bowling or Bethell's balance.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes mainly with Jacob Bethell, Romario Shepherd, Nuwan Thushara and Jacob Duffy around Salt/Hazlewood locks for overseas slots.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: In RCB's 2026 squad as a specialist finishing all-rounder, but four-overseas-slot squeeze keeps him short of guaranteed.
